text:
OT header 

VALUES: 01 = Pharmacy. A facility or location where drugs and other medically related items and services 
are sold, dispensed, or otherwise provided directly to patients. 

02 = Telehealth. The location where health services and health related services are provided or 
received, through a telecommunication system. (Effective January 1, 2017) 

03 = School. A facility whose primary purpose is education.
